content.text:
Here’s a quick plan for what to do next:

- Tell me what policy you need:
  - If you have the slug (the exact identifier), just share it and I’ll fetch that policy text.
  - If you’re not sure of the slug, describe the topic (e.g., data privacy, incident response, acceptable use) and whether you want a brief summary or the full policy. I can suggest likely slugs and fetch them.

- If you’re unsure, I can run a few common candidates in parallel to locate the right one. Examples of plausible slugs to try (tell me which to fetch, or I’ll pick a few):
  - data_privacy_policy
  - incident_response_policy
  - acceptable_use_policy
  - information_security_policy
  - remote_work_policy
  - data_retention_policy

- After we retrieve a policy, I can:
  - provide a concise summary, or
  - present the full text, and
  - extract key actions, responsibilities, and points to note.

What would you like to do? Share a slug, or describe the topic and desired output (summary or full text).

tools.description: Look up an internal policy by slug.
tools.name: lookup_policy

tools.description: Look up an internal policy by slug.
tools.name: lookup_policy
